blended.narrative: Wolf Creek is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Strong winds with gusts to 42 mph may cause lift holds. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: overcast, highs of 43°F, gusts to 42 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 40".
